name: INTELLINETICS, INC.
business: Intellinetics is a document services and software solutions company providing digital transformation and process automation to small-to-medium businesses and governmental sectors. They offer software platforms (IntelliCloud, YellowFolder) and document conversion services.

exposures.sentence: The convergence of many technologies has resulted in unforeseen competitors arising from companies that were traditionally not viewed as threats to our marketplace, particularly with respect to artificial intelligence (AI).
The homebuilding industry had a poor year which in turn resulted in curtailed spending across the board, including our solutions.

catalysts.event: Renewed contract with State of Michigan
catalysts.sentence: effective June 1, 2025 through May 31, 2030, securing a renewal contract with our largest customer

catalysts.event: Repaid remaining outstanding principal and interest on 2022 Notes
catalysts.sentence: On June 18, 2025, we repaid the remaining outstanding principal and interest on our 2022 Notes.
on May 28, 2025, commencing an at-the-market offering

catalysts.event: Secured $1 million line of credit with JPMorgan Chase
catalysts.sentence: effective February 16, 2026, securing a line of credit through JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. in the amount of $1 million
